'''Dairn Maggli''' was a small-time [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and arms dealer after the [[Rally on Naboo/Legends|Uprising on Naboo]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for hijacking an artillery shipment on its way to [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. He was eventually captured by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
